name: Default
_comment: Clean master profile aligned with the post-2026-06 gain-staging pass. Volume 91 is about +6 dB; Delay/Reverb 64 = unity 0 dB. Compressor defaults to threshold about -20 dB, ratio about 2:1, 50% mix, and about +6 dB makeup. For louder/saturator character load fxmaster-hot instead.
